case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR VS. JERRY ANTHONY MAGLIOCCO

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MAGLIOCCO, JERRY ANTHONY $1,547.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,592.50, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM QUEENA HO FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,547.00 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT MAGLIOCCO, JERRY ANTHONY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-01-2009 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $45.50) SERVED MAY-29-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MAGLIOCCO, JERRY ANTHONY
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-01-2009 - JUDGMENT.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-01-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-01-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: QUEENA HO. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED SEP-01-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
